VRCForge Windows release builds may bundle the official uv Windows x64
runtime binaries to bootstrap Unity MCP on machines without Python or uv.

Upstream project: https://github.com/astral-sh/uv
License: MIT OR Apache-2.0

VRCForge does not modify the uv binaries. The bundled files are used only by
the local Launcher to run `uvx --from mcpforunityserver unity-mcp` with cache
and managed Python directories under the user's VRCForge data folder.
